prerequisites: No API key, token, or account is required. The Wikimedia Analytics (AQS) Pageviews API is public and open.
A descriptive HTTP User-Agent identifying your application and contact info is required by Wikimedia policy; generic agents such as curl or python-requests may be blocked or throttled.
Know the project you are querying (e.g. en.wikipedia.org) for the 'project' field.
For per-article queries, know the exact article title for the 'article' field and the 'start' and 'end' dates in YYYYMMDD format.
For per-country queries, know the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the 'country' field.
Choose an 'access' filter value (all-access, desktop, mobile-app, or mobile-web) and an 'agent' filter value (all-agents, user, spider, or automated).

authMethods.name: No authentication (public API)
authMethods.summary: The connector defines no secret fields. The Wikimedia Analytics Pageviews API is publicly accessible and needs no API key, token, or login. Wikimedia policy still requires every request to send a descriptive HTTP User-Agent header that names the application and gives contact information; requests with a missing or generic User-Agent may be blocked or rate-limited.

setupSteps.title: Confirm no credentials are needed
setupSteps.body: This source has no secret fields. The Wikimedia Analytics (AQS) Pageviews API is open, so you do not create or supply an API key or token. You only configure which pageview data to request.

setupSteps.title: Set a descriptive User-Agent
setupSteps.body: Wikimedia requires a descriptive HTTP User-Agent on all requests, such as 'MyApp/1.0 (https://example.org; contact@example.org)'. Avoid generic strings like curl or python-requests, which Wikimedia may block or throttle without notice.

setupSteps.title: Configure the target project and filters
setupSteps.body: Set 'project' to the wiki you want (for example en.wikipedia.org). Set 'access' to one of all-access, desktop, mobile-app, or mobile-web, and 'agent' to one of all-agents, user, spider, or automated to filter the traffic type returned.

setupSteps.title: Configure the query scope
setupSteps.body: For per-article pageviews, set 'article' to the exact page title and set 'start' and 'end' as YYYYMMDD dates to bound the range. For per-country pageviews, set 'country' to the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country you want.
